data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified user decision-making by reducing the number of choices at checkout.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined checkout process with prominently featured options.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes the placement of action buttons to enhance usability and accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Prominent positioning and sizing of purchase and navigation buttons.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Consistent user experiences across devices and platforms.
data.technical_spec: Unified design language and responsive design for multi-platform support.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Breaks information into chunks to avoid cognitive overload.
data.technical_spec: Categorical product listings with grouping of similar items.

data.title: Tesler’s Law
data.description: Complex processes are abstracted for ease of use.
